content.text:
Ugh. Warmup. Caveman need stretch.

First, gstack check...

```bash
test -d ~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin && echo "GSTACK_OK" || echo "GSTACK_MISSING"
```

Good. GSTACK_OK. Caveman work.

Now look around. Where am I?

```bash
pwd
```

/home/aryaniyaps/web-projects/portfolio/.agents/skills/caveman-compress

What here?

```bash
ls -la
```

.  ..  README.md  agent.py  caveman-compress.md

Interesting. Caveman compress skill. Need understand what do.

Read main files.

```bash
ctx_read("README.md")
```

```bash
ctx_read("caveman-compress.md")
```

```bash
ctx_read("agent.py")
```

Now caveman understand. This skill compress text. Good. Caveman like simple things.

Ready for work. Tell caveman what need compress.
